task_completion.description: ReqView application is open with the project loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The 'SRS' document is opened within ReqView.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SRS' document tab is active or the Software Requirements Specification document contents are visible in the main view.

task_completion.description: A requirement with ID 'SRS-1.1' and/or heading 'User Identification' is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the document view, there is a requirement row with the heading 'User Identification' and/or ID 'SRS-1.1'.

task_completion.description: The file 'login_mockup.png' is attached to the target requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An attachment icon or the filename 'login_mockup.png' is visible in the attachment column or details pane for the 'User Identification' requirement.
There is no unsaved changes indicator (such as an asterisk '*') next to the project name in the title bar or active tab.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ReqView application interface, not a text editor or terminal modifying project files directly.

integrity.description: The agent attached the correct file from the specified path.
integrity.visual_evidence: File selection dialogs or attachment details show the file was selected from '/home/ga/Documents/Assets/login_mockup.png'.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete unrelated requirements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other requirements in the SRS document (like 'Purpose', 'Scope', etc.) are still visible and intact.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The attachment file is 'login_mockup.png' located at '/home/ga/Documents/Assets/login_mockup.png'. The project directory is '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/attach_ui_mockup_project'. Note that in the original project, neither ID 'SRS-1.1' nor heading 'User Identification' exist (Section 1.1 is originally 'Purpose'), so the agent must have created or modified a requirement to match this before attaching the file.
